title: Roaming Kittens
tagline: Animated pixel-cats wander the yuyu knowledge graph — a cute skin that doubles as a real graph-rendering stress-test

detail_body: Animated pixel-cats wander across the yuyu knowledge graph — the project's playful "serious tool, cute skin" visual harness.
It's charming, and at the same time a genuine stress-test of the graph rendering.
